html:
2026-0389
2026-04-29FINCanadian International Trade Tribunal ActReappointment of a full-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade TribunalReappointment of Randolph Heggart of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective June 24, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a full-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal
precis: Reappointment of Randolph Heggart of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective June 24, 2026.
